mapper.sql: id, order_id, pay_sn, third_trade_no, pay_platform, amount, status, pay_time, callback_time, fail_reason, refund_status, refund_amount, refund_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS paymentId, p.order_id AS orderId, o.order_sn AS orderSn, p.pay_sn AS paySn, p.third_trade_no AS thirdTradeNo, CASE p.pay_platform WHEN 1 THEN 'ALIPAY_SANDBOX' WHEN 2 THEN 'MOCK' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS payPlatform, p.amount, CASE p.status WHEN 0 THEN 'UNPAID' WHEN 1 THEN 'PAID' WHEN 2 THEN 'FAILED' WHEN 3 THEN 'CLOSED' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS status, p.pay_time AS payTime, p.callback_time AS callbackTime, p.fail_reason AS failReason, CASE p.refund_status WHEN 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN 1 THEN 'REFUNDING' WHEN 2 THEN 'REFUNDED' WHEN 3 THEN 'REFUND_FAILED' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS refundStatus, p.refund_amount AS refundAmount, p.refund_time AS refundTime FROM payment p JOIN `order` o ON p.order_id = o.id WHERE p.id = #{paymentId} AND o.user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT p.id, p.order_id, p.pay_sn, p.third_trade_no, p.pay_platform, p.amount, p.status, p.pay_time, p.callback_time, p.fail_reason, p.refund_status, p.refund_amount, p.refund_time, p.create_time, p.update_time FROM payment p JOIN `order` o ON p.order_id = o.id WHERE p.order_id = #{orderId} AND o.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM payment WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
SELECT FROM payment WHERE pay_sn = #{paySn} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM payment WHERE pay_sn = #{paySn} LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE payment SET pay_platform = #{payPlatform}, status = 1, third_trade_no = #{thirdTradeNo}, pay_time = #{payTime}, callback_time = #{callbackTime}, fail_reason = NULL, update_time = #{callbackTime} WHERE id = #{paymentId} AND status != 1
UPDATE payment SET pay_platform = #{payPlatform}, status = 2, fail_reason = #{failReason}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{paymentId} AND status != 1
